description: A developer requests a temporary exception to the security policy that blocks outbound traffic so they can connect to a new third-party API for testing.

nodes.task_description: Receive the policy exception request, including the business justification and the specific IP address and port required.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly processes the incoming request.

nodes.task_description: Assess the risk of granting the exception, including researching the reputation of the third-party IP address.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst determines the risk is acceptable for a limited time.

nodes.task_description: Approve the request for a limited duration (e.g., 1 week) and create a temporary firewall rule to allow the traffic.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst grants the time-bound exception and implements the required technical control.
